title: BigInv
description: Increases the size of the player's inventory
body:
Increases the size of the player's inventory and hotbar.

The inventory now has 90 slots (up from 27 in vanilla), and the hotbar has 18 (up from 9 in vanilla).

The expanded inventory displays in all vanilla and modded guis using an automatic patching system. Behaviour can also be customised per-inventory via a config file to manually add support for modded guis.
